eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 10:07 PM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 2:07 AM JUL 11, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-147 18000 block E Evans Creek rd due to East Evans Creek rd fire. Continue to monitor local government channels for evacuation and incident updates
